sort of removes a tremendous amount of

evolving distribution of probable

anytime you move left tail risk from the
distribution, you're talking about a
mean and a median that's higher. So we
got risk on you know, pricing. So what's

strong. Earnings are still strong.

that the kind of view you have? Yeah, it
well as long as you remove that
distribute that that left tail risk. If
you go back to the other five key market
cycles growth is in a tailwind right
now. You have monetary policy in a
tailwind. You have fiscal policy in a
tailwind. You have liquidity in a
tailwind. As long as those tailwinds
persist, it's highly likely that we
sustain a trend of risk on market
regime. You have a brilliant note. At

advantage that retail investors have
which is the ability to get paid by
beta.
So why spend all this money chasing you
know, fancy you know, alternative asset
classes when you can actually just take
advantage of beta and smart beta
solutions and and the types of solutions
that we offer with our kiss model
portfolio.
>> an example of that. We got to go here in
a minute, but give us one example of
what you do with smart beta. If you just
add a reasonably sophisticated trend
following overlay to beta, you can chop
off the left tail of the distribution
and leave yourself with a positively
skewed return distribution which allows
you to compound returns faster.
